{{Quote|Welcome to Jedi Training. I am JTR-47, automated combat specialist. I will be responsible for your initial training.|JTR-47|<ref name="Star Wars: Obi-Wan">[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan (video game)|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan'']]</ref>}}
'''JTR-47''' was a training [[Droid/Legends|droid]] used in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] to help young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] hone their skills. Prior to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], JTR-47 had a hand in helping [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] through the course, instructing him on how to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Force jump/Legends|jump]], [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Push|Force push]], and [[Telekinesis/Legends#Saber throw|throw]] and [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|fight]] with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], among other abilities such as how to disarm a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]-wielding opponent.

{{Droid-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In [[Star Wars: Obi-Wan (video game)|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan'']], every droid in the training course is named JTR-47. This article assumes that only the initial droid that introduces themself to Obi-Wan Kenobi is JTR-47.<ref name="ObiWan">[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan (video game)|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan'']]</ref>
